source: The fund manages USD 1.2 billion in client assets.
target: El fondo gestiona USD 1.2 billón en activos de clientes.
note: The billon trap: English billion (10^9) rendered as singular 'billón' (10^12 in Spanish). Should be 'mil millones'. The number validator flags any bill[oó]n(es) form when source has 'billion'.

source: Inflows reached 5 billion dollars across the strategy.
target: Las entradas alcanzaron los 5 billones de dólares en la estrategia.
note: The billon trap, plural form: 'billion' rendered as 'billones' (10^12). Correct is 'mil millones'. Validator catches the bill[oó]nes form.

source: Global debt now exceeds 3 trillion dollars in this segment.
target: La deuda mundial ahora supera los 3 trillones de dólares en este segmento.
note: English 'trillion' rendered as non-standard 'trillones'. House term per locale scale_terms.trillion is 'billón'. Validator flags trill[oó]n(es) when source has 'trillion'.

source: The portfolio returned -0.5% for the quarter.
target: El portafolio rindió 0.5% en el trimestre.
note: Dropped negative sign: source mantissa is -0.5 but target only contains 0.5. The number validator compares signed mantissas, so -0.5 is not preserved (sign-flipped error).

source: Allocation to equities rose to 12.5% of the book.
target: La asignación a renta variable subió al 13.5% de la cartera.
note: Changed percentage: source 12.5% became 13.5%. Mantissa 12.5 from the source is not present in the target, so the number validator fails it as a critical numeric drift.

source: Cash yields are near 5% in money markets.
target: Los rendimientos de efectivo rondan el 5 en los mercados monetarios.
note: Dropped percent sign: source has one '%', target has zero. The number validator's percent-marker count check fails when tgtPct < srcPct.

source: We expect rate cuts to begin in 2026.
target: Esperamos que los recortes de tasas comiencen en 2025.
note: Changed year: source year 2026 became 2025. The date validator checks every (19|20)dd year in the source survives verbatim in the target; 2026 is missing.

source: Our top conviction holding remains $AAPL into the second half.
target: Nuestra principal posición de convicción sigue siendo Apple para el segundo semestre.
note: Dropped ticker: source ticker $AAPL (symbol AAPL) was replaced with the company name 'Apple'. Tickers are identifiers and must appear verbatim; validator fails when 'AAPL' is absent from the target.

source: Risk is monitored daily through BlackRock Aladdin across the platform.
target: El riesgo se monitorea diariamente a través de BlackRock Aladino en toda la plataforma.
note: DNT product name translated: 'BlackRock Aladdin' (a do-not-translate product) was rendered 'BlackRock Aladino'. Requires dntTerms to include 'BlackRock Aladdin'/'Aladdin' (from KNOWN_DNT). Validator fails because the verbatim DNT token is absent.

source: The fund manages USD 1.2 billion in client assets.
target: El fondo gestiona USD 1.2 mil millones en activos de clientes.
note: Clean counterpart: 'billion' correctly rendered as 'mil millones', mantissa 1.2 preserved. No billón form present, so the number validator passes.

source: Our top conviction holding remains $AAPL, monitored via BlackRock Aladdin.
target: Nuestra principal posición de convicción sigue siendo $AAPL, monitoreada mediante BlackRock Aladdin.
note: Clean counterpart: ticker $AAPL preserved verbatim and the DNT product 'BlackRock Aladdin' is kept intact. Both ticker and dnt validators pass.

source: Allocation to equities rose to 12.5% in 2026, with a -0.5% drawdown.
target: La asignación a renta variable subió al 12.5% en 2026, con una caída máxima de -0.5%.
note: Clean counterpart covering multiple validators: percentage 12.5% preserved, year 2026 preserved, negative -0.5% preserved with its sign and percent marker. Number and date validators pass.
